result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded all 6 survey datasets from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, and created harmonized age-specific education variables (educaim17, educaim19, educaim20, educaim25, educaim32) using the standardized six-category coding scheme (0=NVQ 4-5, 1=NVQ 1-3, 2=None/entry level, 3=Other, 4=None of these qualifications, 5=Not studying). All missing value codes were properly mapped according to metadata specifications. The final cleaned dataset has been written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with only the NSID and the 5 harmonized age-specific variables.
